headline: Former Wells Fargo Team Rejoins the Firm From Ameriprise
summary: Wells Fargo  Advisors has welcomed back a former financial advisory team that had previously decamped for  Ameriprise  where they oversaw more than $550 million in assets.  Advisors Thomas Hughes and Bill Steele joined Wells Fargo on Tuesday in a move the brokerage firm announced Thursday.  The team, based in Southlake, Texas, also includes Betty Cadena, a senior registered client associate.

headline: Bank of America Signals Solid Q2 Boost From Trading, IB and Wealth Fees
summary: BAC projects nearly 15% Q2'26 trading revenue growth, with strong IB and wealth management performance lifting fee income.

headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Agilent Stock Is Having Its Best Day Since 2002. Earnings Leave Wall Street With ‘Little to Pick At.’
summary: Agilent Technologies stock surges as Wall Street approves of the company’s second-quarter earnings and guidance update.

headline: US Funding Markets Are Flooded With Cash That’s Here to Stay
summary: (Bloomberg) -- An abundance of cash in US funding markets appears to be driven by deeper structural shifts that are unlocking billions of dollars in balance-sheet capacity at the biggest banks, Wall Street strategists say. headline: Wells Fargo CEO: AI’s effect on employment is ‘complicated’
summary: The bank's biggest AI-related challenge is determining how the technology can transform its business model and how the lender should respond, Charlie Scharf said Wednesday.
